# Codex Prompt — Phase 0 Docs and Schema Foundation

```text
Read AGENTS.md and docs/openvision/00_INDEX.md.

Goal: add or refine V2 schema/documentation foundation only.

Create or update:
- docs/openvision/schemas/perception_graph.schema.md
- docs/openvision/schemas/hud_scene.schema.md
- docs/openvision/schemas/skill_manifest.schema.md
- docs/openvision/schemas/cloud_evidence_bundle.schema.md
- docs/openvision/schemas/cloud_result.schema.md
- docs/openvision/schemas/memory_event.schema.md

Rules:
- Do not modify runtime code unless needed to align paths in docs.
- Do not add features.
- Do not remove old V1 code.
- Keep docs specific enough that future Codex tasks can implement them.

Output:
- changed files
- what schemas now define
- next implementation PR
```
